hero.lead: I'm Giorgi. For seven years I have been building, shipping and maintaining web systems for production — Laravel, Vue, TypeScript, PostgreSQL. I care about code that's still easy to change six months from now.
sections.work.title: Recent projects, briefly.
sections.capabilities.title: What I do for clients and teams.
sections.capabilities.lead: Three things, done with rigor. Not a wishlist of every framework I've touched — only what I'd take responsibility for in production.
sections.stack.title: Tools I reach for.
sections.journal.title: Notes on the work.
sections.contact.title: If you'd like to work together, write to me
sections.contact.lead: I'm open to senior roles, contract engagements, and shorter advisory work. The fastest way to start a conversation is email — I read everything and reply within two business days.
capabilities.greenfield.title: Greenfield builds
capabilities.greenfield.body: Web products from zero — auth, billing, admin, the public site. I'll architect, build, and ship the first usable version.
capabilities.rewrites.title: Rewrites and rescues
capabilities.rewrites.body: Legacy PHP, jQuery and Symfony codebases brought into the present. Risk-managed, incremental, observable.
capabilities.senior.title: Senior engineering
capabilities.senior.body: Long-term contracts as a senior on existing teams. Code review, mentoring, and reducing the team's deploy fear.
projects.title: Selected work
projects.lead: A curated selection of projects spanning fintech integrations, content platforms, e-commerce backends and developer tools. Each shipped to production, each maintained.
blog.title: Journal
blog.lead: Notes on engineering, architecture and the craft of building software. Long-form when the topic deserves it, short when it doesn't.
skills.title: Skills & expertise
skills.lead: Tools and technologies I work with daily. The list is honest — if it's here, I've shipped production with it. Coloured logos earn their place on this page only.
skills.cta_title: Need someone with this stack on your team?
experience.title: Experience
experience.lead: A timeline of professional work and notable open-source releases. The Composer packages I author for Georgian fintech are highlighted.
experience.next_title: Currently taking on new senior Laravel engagements.
repositories.title: Open source
repositories.lead: Production-grade Composer packages and developer tools published on GitHub. Each one solves a specific problem I hit on a real client project.
repositories.empty: No repositories to show right now.
services.title: Services
services.lead: Three offers, structured. Each has a clear scope, a clear price model and a clear timeline. No vague "strategy" decks — just shipped software.
services.process_title: From first email to live deploy.
services.process.intro.title: Intro call
services.process.intro.body: 30 minutes. You describe the problem; I tell you whether I'm the right person and what a realistic engagement looks like. No sales script.
services.process.scope.title: Written scope
services.process.scope.body: Before any code, you get a one-page document: deliverables, timeline, fixed price or rate, what's explicitly out of scope.
services.process.build.title: Build, in the open
services.process.build.body: Daily commits to a private repo, a working preview environment from week one, weekly demos. You see progress in production code, not screenshots.
services.process.ship.title: Ship and hand off
services.process.ship.body: Production deploy, two weeks of bug-fix support included, README and runbooks for your team. Optional retainer after.
about.title: Engineering, with care.
about.skills_lead: The shortlist. Full breakdown by category lives on the Skills page.
about.hobbies_lead: I keep my hands busy when I'm not in front of a screen. These keep my judgement sharp.
footer.tagline: Senior web developer based in Tbilisi. I build production systems with Laravel, Vue and TypeScript.
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.lead: Senior Laravel + Vue engagements, Composer-package work, technical advisory. Tell me what you're building — I read every message.
contact.name: Your name
contact.message_placeholder: What are you trying to build, what's already in place, what's the timeline?
contact.privacy: Your details stay between us. No newsletter, no CRM, no marketing list.
contact.success_body: I'll come back to you within two business days. If it's urgent, send a follow-up email — I'll move it up the queue.
education.title: Education & training
education.lead: Formal education and the continuous learning that actually shapes day-to-day work — certifications, deep-dive courses, conference talks.
gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.lead: Photographs from trips, projects and the time spent away from the editor. Click any image to view full-size.
gallery.empty: No images in this category yet.
errors.404.title: Lost in the archive
errors.404.body: The page you were looking for has moved, was retired, or never existed in the first place. No drama — try one of the routes below or head home.
